scripts.dev: concurrently --names worker,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "bun run dev:worker" "bun run dev:frontend"
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply primer-db --local --config wrangler.api.toml
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply primer-db --remote --config wrangler.api.toml
scripts.db:status: wrangler d1 migrations list primer-db --local --config wrangler.api.toml
scripts.db:status:remote: wrangler d1 migrations list primer-db --remote --config wrangler.api.toml
scripts.deploy: bun run typecheck && bun run test:run && vite build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.api.toml && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name primer-ui
scripts.deploy:api: bun run typecheck && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.api.toml
scripts.deploy:ui: bun run typecheck && vite build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name primer-ui
scripts.deploy:fast: vite build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.api.toml && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name primer-ui
